reasoning: When my roof broke and Binod had no work for weeks, it was the grass people who came to my house and asked our names. The lotus people did not come. I do not know all the things the newspapers say — about this man Shahjahan far away, about who is corrupt and who is not. But I know my own life. The Khadya Sathi ration and the Swasthya Sathi card — these keep us from going hungry and keep me from selling my son's labour for medicine. The grass people gave us these things when we needed them. That is what my hands have lived, and that is why I press the grass button.
primary_drivers: Direct experience of AITC/TMC workers coming to help during roof crisis when Binod had no work
Dependency on Khadya Sathi ration and Swasthya Sathi health program for survival
BJP's absence during family's moment of greatest need
